notes: v0.22.0: Future Standard — announced sets with no spoiled cards yet (Nauctis: The Sunken Realm, Kamigawa: Titanbreach, Zhalfir, plus the 2027 Universes Beyond slots) on the Sets page, each linked to its official announcement.
